## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (DCO)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`cargo test --workspace`)
- [ ] Formatting and lints pass (`cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
